parameters: <center>As the hero reached for the sword, the voice
returned - or was it a new voice altogether?
<center>"Let us destroy Sargon together..."
<center>Wounded, weakened, and desperate, the Hero reached
around the hilt of the blade, and gripped it tightly. To
come so far, just to fall at the final hurdle, was an
unthinkable outcome.
A_Ziyal
Sargon...let us finish this!
$gameScreen.startFadeOut(180);
A_Ziyal
An unnatural blue flame burns here...it dances
as if it is alive somehow...
A_Ziyal
An unnatural blue flame burns here...it dances
as if it is alive somehow...
<center>The hero's sword was damaged beyond repair. The
spire was a dangerous place. Desperation began to creep in,
as the hero sought to confront Sargon...
A_Ziyal
Can't...stop...I have to push on...
Wait...what's that ahead? A sword? I can
feel an aura of power resonating from it...

<center>As the hero approached the dais, a voice took hold
inside their mind. Imploring them, to go no further. That
they should turn back at all costs...
A_Ziyal
What...is this? No...this must be a trick of
Sargon... this must be a powerful weapon. I
must use it against him!

the voice again implored the hero to stop. Only misery and
suffering awaited, should they proceed.
A_Ziyal
No...this is a trick. Sargon must be
destroyed!

completely to dust. It seems as if it was
reaching for the sword...
